## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's conventions (see `CONTRIBUTING.md` / `CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (if I touched the Rust backend)
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
